comment:
Замена: \(8^x=t,t>0\)
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}}
\frac{2\cdotp \frac{1}{8} \cdotp t}{2\cdotp \frac{1}{8} \cdotp t-1} -\frac{3}{t-1} -\frac{8}{t^{2} -5t+4} \geq 0\\
\frac{\frac{1}{4} \cdotp t}{\frac{1}{4} \cdotp t-1} -\frac{3}{t-1} -\frac{8}{t^{2} -5t+4} \geq 0
\end{array}$$
Упростим:
$$\displaystyle \frac{\frac{1}{4} \cdotp t}{\frac{1}{4} \cdotp t-1} =\frac{\frac{t}{4}}{\frac{t}{4} -1} =\frac{\frac{t}{4}}{\frac{t-4}{4}} =\frac{t}{4} \cdotp \frac{4}{t-4} =\frac{t}{t-4}$$
Возвращаемся к неравенству:
$$\frac{t}{t-4} -\frac{3}{t-1} -\frac{8}{( t-1)( t-4)} \geq 0\\ \frac{t^{2} -t-3t+12-8}{( t-1)( t-4)} \geq 0\\ \frac{t^{2} -4t+4}{( t-1)( t-4)} \geq 0\\ \frac{( t-2)^{2}}{( t-1)( t-4)} \geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
t >4\\
t=2\\
\begin{cases}
t >0\\
t< 1
\end{cases}
\end{array} \right.$$
Обратная замена:
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}}
\left[ \begin{array}{l l}
8^{x} >4\\
8^{x} =2\\
\begin{cases}
8^{x} >0\\
8^{x} < 1
\end{cases}
\end{array} \right.\\
\left[ \begin{array}{l l}
2^{3x} >2^{2}\\
2^{3x} >2^1\\
\begin{cases}
2^{3x} >0\\
2^{3x} < 2^{0}
\end{cases}
\end{array} \right.\\
\left[ \begin{array}{l l}
3x >2\\
3x=1\\
3x< 0
\end{array} \right.\\
\left[ \begin{array}{l l}
x >\frac{2}{3}\\
x=\frac{1}{3}\\
x< 0
\end{array} \right.
\end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x\in (-\infty ;0)~\cup\) {\(\frac{1}{3})\cup (\frac{2}{3};+\infty)\)
